description: CompositionWhite round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with graphic print on the front FittingRegularWash care Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent in warm water (maximum 40 degrees) Do not wring or bleach Flat dry in shade Do not iron on print Bring out the trendy fashionista side of you with this white graphic tee from the Power Puff range of jealous 21. The graphic of the girl on the front pays tribute to 90's ethereal simplicity. Team this t-shirt with white pants and minimal and shimmer for a really cool look. Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
